_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: CD3+ T cell densities were significantly increased in malignant compared to benign tumors (p=0.0171)
details: Successfully detected T cells showing significantly increased densities in malignant compared to benign tumors (p=0.0171)
